<!--
Thanks for contributing to elsar! Please fill in the sections below.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for conventions and the local check commands.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- A short summary of the change and why it's needed. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number, if applicable -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal (no user-visible change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The change is focused on one logical thing.
- [ ] I ran `devtools::document()` and committed regenerated `man/` + `NAMESPACE` (if I touched roxygen).
- [ ] I ran `devtools::test()` and added/updated tests for the change.
- [ ] I ran `devtools::check()` with no new ERRORs/WARNINGs/NOTEs.
- [ ] I added a bullet to `NEWS.md` (for any user-visible change).
- [ ] Examples that need GEE, a network, or large data are wrapped in `\dontrun{}`.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, areas you're unsure about. -->
